label: Statistics
shortDescription: A free statistics course from descriptive summaries through probability, inference, regression, and non-parametric methods.
modulesDescription: Read the statistics chapters in order, or jump directly to the topic you need.

topics.title: Descriptive Statistics
topics.description: Measures of center, spread, shape, and data visualization.

topics.title: Foundations of Probability
topics.description: Sample spaces, probability rules, conditional probability, and Bayes' theorem.

topics.title: Discrete Probability Distributions
topics.description: Random variables, PMFs, expected value, binomial, Poisson, and geometric distributions.

topics.title: Continuous Probability Distributions
topics.description: PDFs, CDFs, normal, exponential, and uniform distributions.

topics.title: Sampling and Data Distributions
topics.description: Population vs. sample, law of large numbers, central limit theorem, and sampling distributions.

topics.title: Statistical Inference: Estimation
topics.description: Point estimation, maximum likelihood estimation, and confidence intervals.

topics.title: Statistical Inference: Hypothesis Testing
topics.description: Null and alternative hypotheses, p-values, Type I/II errors, and t-tests.

topics.title: Analysis of Variance
topics.description: One-way ANOVA, the F-test, multiple comparisons, and two-way ANOVA.

topics.title: Linear Regression and Correlation
topics.description: Pearson correlation, OLS regression, residuals, and inference for coefficients.

topics.title: Multiple Linear Regression
topics.description: Multiple predictors, partial effects, multicollinearity, model selection, and diagnostics.

topics.title: Logistic Regression
topics.description: Modeling binary outcomes, odds ratios, maximum likelihood estimation, and classification.

topics.title: Non-Parametric Statistics
topics.description: Chi-square tests, Mann-Whitney U, and Wilcoxon signed-rank tests.

topics.title: Stochastic Processes
topics.description: Markov chains, Poisson processes, Brownian motion, and basic time series.

topics.title: Bayesian Inference
topics.description: Prior distributions, posterior updating, credible intervals, and Bayesian model comparison.
